start.welcome:
👋 Hi, {name}!

I'll create images for you from text descriptions using AI. Just describe what to draw.

🎨 Tap «Create» to start.
start.help: PromptArt — AI image generator Commands: /start — main menu /settings — model and style settings /history — recent generations /favorites — saved favorites /help — this help How to use: 1. Tap «🎨 Create» 2. Describe the image 3. Wait 5–15 seconds 4. Use buttons under the result Powered by Pollinations.ai
generation.nsfw: ⚠️ Request rejected by filter. Avoid names of real people and explicit content.
generation.daily_limit: 📊 Daily limit reached ({limit} generations). Come back tomorrow or use /upgrade.
generation.empty_prompt: Prompt can't be empty. Describe the image.
generation.too_long: Prompt too long. Keep it under 500 characters.
generation.premium_required: 💰 The {model} model requires more pollen than your account has. Switch to flux or zimage in /settings.
settings.title: ⚙️ Settings Model: {model} Size: {ratio} Style: {style}
history.title: 📜 Your history
history.empty: No generations yet. Create your first one — tap «🎨 Create».
favorites.title: 💾 Your favorites
favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Save generations you like with the «💾 Favorite» button.
enhance.error: Couldn't enhance prompt. Using the original.
errors.api_down: 🔧 Generation service is temporarily unavailable. Try in a minute.
